title: ErrorEnvelope
description: Structured error envelope emitted to stdout by any sqlite-graphrag subcommand when --json is active and a handled error occurs. The process exits with a non-zero code matching the 'code' field.

error.description: Always true; signals to consumers that this line is an error envelope, not a success response.

code.description: Exit code that the process will return, matching the sqlite-graphrag exit code table (e.g. 4 = not found, 9 = duplicate, 10 = database error).

message.description: Human-readable English description of the error.
